Home / Services / Bathroom Remodeling

Bathroom Remodeling

Plumbing upgrades for Atlanta's bathroom renovations.

Atlanta's mix of historic charm and modern living creates unique bathroom plumbing challenges. We help homeowners preserve character while adding functionality.

In Virginia-Highland bungalows, we carefully relocate plumbing in pier-and-beam foundations. For high-rise condos in Midtown, we coordinate with building management on riser access. Every project begins with a water efficiency assessment - crucial with our summer drought risks.

Popular upgrades include: Converting clawfoot tubs to walk-in showers in Inman Park, adding laundry hookups to O4W lofts, and creating spa bathrooms in Buckhead estates without compromising water pressure.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Structural assessment for older homes
  2. 02 Step 2: Fixture and layout planning
  3. 03 Step 3: Permitting assistance
  4. 04 Step 4: Precision installation with daily cleanup

Benefits

  • Historic preservation specialists
  • Water-efficient fixture options
  • Seamless HOA coordination
  • 5-year craftsmanship warranty

Frequently Asked Questions

Can you work with my historic home's limitations?

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with bathroom remodeling? Contact us today.
